title: Activate live Stage 2 SSE runtime and verify route emission
objective: Restart the live dashboard server process cleanly so the on-disk Stage 2 SSE code is active, then prove /api/stream/state is live and polling fallback still works.
acceptance_criteria: at least one live SSE payload is captured
no code change unless truly required
final result is VERIFIED, PARTIAL, or BLOCKED
rollback: Restart the prior dashboard process path if needed. No code change intended.
